title: Cobblemon Pokedex (Cobbledex)
description: A sidemod for Cobblemon to quickly see useful information about each PokÃĐmon
body:
### About
Cobbledex (or Cobblemon Pokedex) is a sidemod for [Cobblemon](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) that adds a new UI that can be accessed by right-clicking the **Cobbledex** (opens Collection) or using it on a PokÃĐmon (opens the Details)

#### You should get it after choosing your starter but you can also craft it!

---

### â ïļ Important, please read! â ïļ

When adding this mod to your modpack/server be aware that this mod do have a lot options to customize player experience. After the first boot of your modpack/server it should generate a config file in `config/cobbledex/settings.json` where you can choose how you want some features to work (if only work if seen/caught species species or totally disable it)

There is also `config/cobbledex/rewards.json` where you can customize the Caught rewards (it can be disabled on settings.json)

Both config files are server-sided so just server/host need to make the changes.

**That's my very first mod and there is a lot of stuff that still need to be done.**\
Feel free to report any bug or feature request on [GitHub](https://github.com/Rafacasari/cobbledex/issues).

---

### Features
âģ Collection - You can quickly see which species you already got and which ones are missing\
âģ Caught Rewards - Give rewards for players based on the total different PokÃĐmon that they already got (some PokÃĐmon can have multiple forms and will be counted more than once, like Pikachu have Pikachu Alolan)\
âģ An amazing 3d model (with a fantastic 2d icon) made by **oovowl** and **Alro**!\
âģ Need to see which item a PokÃĐmon drop? You can see **PokÃĐmon Drops**!\
âģ Don't know where to find more of your favorite PokÃĐmon? Use our **Where to find** list!\
âģ You can't memorize which elemental type is better in your battles? Don't worry, our **Battle** section will help you a lot!\
âģ Are you confused of how to evolve to a specific form of Eevee? You can use your PokÃĐdex to see **how to evolve your PokÃĐmon** to your favorite form!\
âģ Also available in the following languages: `es_es`, `es_mx`, `fr_fr`, `de_de`

---

### Commands and Permissions

âģ `/cobbledex config [variableName] [true/false]`\
 \- Disable or enable a option in your server/modpack\
 \- E.g. `/cobbledex config HowToFind_NeedCatch true` will need to CATCH a PokÃĐmon in order to see where it spawn\
 \- Permission needed: `cobblemon.commands.cobbledex.config` (or level 4)\

âģ `/cobbledex show [pokemon]`\
 \- Show the Info for the specific Pokemon (without need of a cobbledex)\
 \- E.g. `/cobbledex show Pikachu`\
 \- Permission needed: `cobblemon.commands.cobbledex.show` (or level 2)\

âģ `/cobbledex collection`\
 \- Show the Collection GUI (without need of a cobbledex)\
 \- E.g. `/cobbledex collection`\
 \- Permission needed: `cobblemon.commands.cobbledex.collection` (or level 2)\

âģ `/cobbledex auto {players}`\
 \- Automatically register all PC/Party Pokemon as CAUGHT\
 \- E.g. `/cobbledex auto Player1 Player2`\
 \- Permission needed: `cobblemon.commands.cobbledex.auto` (or level 4)\

---

### Planned Features
âģ Show more stats about your journey (total wins, total losses, etc\
âģ Show more useful information about each PokÃĐmon (moves, caught chance, etc)\
âģ Display for Caught Rewards (instead of automatically giving)
